title: A 175-Year-Old Shipwreck, Lots of Booze and a Korean Island’s Quest to Survive
summary_full: A South Korean island is reviving a long‑forgotten episode involving a French whaler as a wine festival, in an effort to stay relevant.
summary_public: A South Korean island is reviving a long‑forgotten episode involving a French whaler as a wine festival, in an effort to stay relevant.
